summary: Frontend testing complete for Mobile Action iteration 2. All NEW features are fully functional: Settings page with statistics dashboard (Total: 2, Success: 100%, Today: 2, Failed: 0), Category filter tabs (All, Device, Comms, Apps, System) with correct filtering, Custom Commands page with macro creation, Guide page with all 7 sections, all 3 toggles (TTS, Shake, Background Listening) working, Wake Words display, Clear history functionality, and back navigation from all pages. Command execution works via quick actions, history accumulates correctly, mini stats badge updates in real-time.

issues: Deprecated shadow* style props used (should use boxShadow for web compatibility) - same as iteration 1
Package version warnings: expo-intent-launcher@55.0.12 (expected ~13.0.8), expo-speech@55.0.13 (expected ~14.0.8) - same as iteration 1

seed_data_creation: None - app is fully offline with AsyncStorage persistence
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 features tested and working: Settings page with live statistics dashboard (updates after each command), Category filtering (All/Device/Comms/Apps/System) correctly filters quick actions, Custom Commands page allows creating macros with name/trigger/icon/color/actions, Guide page displays all 7 sections (Getting Started, Voice Commands, Wake Words, Custom Commands, Offline Mode, Tips & Tricks, Supported Devices), All 3 toggles work (TTS, Shake, Background Listening with warning), Wake Words section shows 4 wake words, Clear history removes all items, Back navigation works from all pages. Text input is intentionally hidden on web (uses Web Speech API for voice). Mini stats badge in header updates in real-time showing today's command count. Statistics persist across sessions via AsyncStorage.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no critical issues found. All features working as designed.
